caption: The video presents a series of slides appearing against a white background. In the first frame, an image of a brown, wrinkled creature resembling a grotesque figure or an alien is visible in the upper left corner. The second frame adds the word "Susceptibility" in the center top, along with a brain scan image labeled "1" and "ExP-", attributed to "Gibertson et al., 2002". The third and fourth frames maintain these elements while introducing a section titled "Treatment Responsiveness" below. This new section features two more brain scans. The left scan is labeled "Non responder < Tx responder amygdala," and the right scan is labeled "Non responder < Tx responder ACC," with both attributed to "Bryant et al., 2008". The frames show the gradual layering of medical data and text onto the screen next to the creature image.
